article_meta.title: Venezuelan Political Crisis Trump declares 'Venezuelan regime' a foreign terrorist organization, orders oil tanker block

reasoning: Classification direction is plausible, but the model leans on quoted source language (attribution violations) and outlet reputation rather than the author’s prose/structure. Confidence is over-high for an article whose one-sidedness is primarily conveyed via extensive quoting rather than authorial endorsement.

custom_reasoning.classification_accuracy: Right is plausible; at worst one class off (Lean Right) given one-sided structure and lack of opposing viewpoints.
custom_reasoning.confidence_calibration: 0.98 is too high; the bias signal comes mainly from unchallenged quotes rather than overt authorial language, warranting lower (around 0.85-0.9).
custom_reasoning.reasoning_evidence_quality: Multiple key indicators cite quoted phrases ('illegitimate', 'weak and inept') and outlet reputation; acceptable indicators focus on structure (uncritical, lengthy quotes; lack of dissent).
